testcase.name: launchBrowser

error.message: Unable to obtain: Capabilities {browserName: MicrosoftEdge, ms:edgeOptions: {args: [], extensions: []}}, error Command failed with code: 65, executed: [--browser, MicrosoftEdge, --language-binding, java, --output, json] error sending request for url (https://msedgedriver.azureedge.net/LATEST_RELEASE_145_WINDOWS): error trying to connect: dns error: No such host is known.
